# tfe_registry_gpg_key

This data source can be used to retrieve a private registry GPG key.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization. If omitted, organization must be defined in the provider config.

### Read-Only

- `ascii_armor` (String) ASCII-armored representation of the GPG key.
- `created_at` (String) The time when the GPG key was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String) The time when the GPG key was last updated.
